mujoco_score: CRASHED (KeyError warn_count, now fixed in commit 51a086d)
verdict_notes: Wheels detached from trolley body at physics init, sitting around the trolley. Joint anchors for wheel attachment not placed at wheel pivots. Same class of bug as earlier trolley variants A/B/C/D.
suspected_root_cause: make_simready.py wheel joint creation places joint anchor at wrong local position — not at the wheel axle.
